login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Access your medical AI dashboard
login.toastError: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Get started with AI-powered medical imaging
register.institutionPlaceholder: Your hospital, clinic, or research institution
register.termsAgreement: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.emailHelp: Enter the email address associated with your account
forgotPassword.securityTip1: Reset links expire after 1 hour for security
forgotPassword.securityTip2: Only the most recent reset link is valid
forgotPassword.securityTip3: If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder
forgotPassword.successMessage: We've sent a password reset link to:
forgotPassword.successInstruction: Click the link in the email to reset your password. The link will expire in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.didntReceive: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or contact support.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a new password for your account
resetPassword.invalidMessage: The password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.securityMessage: After resetting your password, you'll be signed out of all devices for security purposes. You'll need to sign in again with your new password.
